description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a broad, low-pitched roof and a rectangular footprint. The roof is dark brown and features a prominent cross-gabled design, providing architectural interest and additional interior space. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted siding, and the structure sits on a green lawn base. A covered front porch is visible, supported by columns, and there are multiple windows distributed along the facades, allowing for ample natural light. The building includes a driveway and what appears to be a garage or carport on one side, enhancing its suburban character.
description: A single-story bungalow with a cross-gabled dark roof, light exterior walls, a covered front porch, and multiple windows, set on a green lawn with a driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, driveway, and garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extension of the roof and a secondary entrance or window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with additional windows and a simple, flat lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the porch and more windows, with less emphasis on the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
